column1: Luis Arraez is the clear-cut pick tonight, riding a top-of-the-order role with a steady bat and a juicy platoon advantage against Chase Burns—his 69.5% hit probability is as reliable as it gets. Brendan Donovan isn’t far behind, leading off for San Diego and also enjoying the lefty edge, making him a strong alternative in a slightly less favorable park. Steven Kwan and Mickey Moniak both bring contact skills and advantageous matchups to the table, but Arraez’s combination of consistency and matchup makes him the gold standard for Beat The Streak players.
